title: mystacinus arabicus
intro: Mystacinus arabicus, also known as the Arabian jasmine or queen of the night, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is native to the Middle East and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mystacinus arabicus include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which can help to combat infections and promote wound healing. Mystacinus arabicus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
